title: If I Could Only Own 7 REITs, It Would Be These
text: I own 18 individual REITs and believe that all of them are great real estate businesses with strong growth prospects. I'd argue that diversification is not the main goal of owning multiple REITs, but rather conviction in each individual company. That said, if I could only own a handful of REITs, there are some truly top-tier, best-in-class names that I could narrow it down to if I had to.

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (MAA) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript

title: Mid-America Apartment (MAA) Q2 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Mid-America Apartment's (MAA) Q2 core FFO & revenues outpace estimates. Results reflect an increase in the average effective rent per unit for the same-store portfolio.

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) Q2 FFO and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Mid-America Apartment Communities (MAA) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $2.28 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.27 per share. This compares to FFO of $2.02 per share a year ago.

title: MAA REPORTS SECOND QUARTER 2023 RESULTS
text: GERMANTOWN, Tenn. , July 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc., or MAA (NYSE: MAA), today announced operating results for the quarter ended June 30, 2023.

title: What Awaits Mid-America Apartment (MAA) This Earnings Season?
text: Mid-America Apartment's (MAA) Q2 results are likely to reflect the healthy demand for apartment units in its markets despite rising supply.

title: My Top 5 REIT CEOs (And 3 Bonus Picks)
text: I decided to put together a list of my top REIT CEOs. This is not a popularity contest. In this article I'll focus on the most important value drivers.

title: Mom's All-Weather REIT Portfolio (Part 2)
text: A few years ago, mom retired from real estate and she's now itching to get back in the game. Recently she told me that she was ready to load up on REITs, recognizing that shares for many high-quality companies are on sale. My mother has no interest in speculative stocks, she's the poster child for sleeping well at night.

title: 10 Big REIT Bargains
text: Each REIT looks too cheap to me. Most of these already are in my portfolio. There's an emphasis on quality. No trash gets thrown in for having a big yield.

title: MAA Announces Date of Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release, Conference Call
text: GERMANTOWN, Tenn. , July 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MAA (NYSE: MAA) announced today that the Company expects to release its second quarter 2023 results on Wednesday, July 26, 2023, after market close and will hold a conference call on Thursday, July 27, 2023, at 9:00 a.m.

title: Mid-America Apartment: Quality Player, Close To A Buy Point
text: Mid-America Apartment has had a rough time since the late 2021 market peak. The fundamentals though are sound and the company has continued to execute soundly. We go over what went wrong and where we would buy this.

title: Mid-America Apartment Communities Could Be Pressured From A Weakening Economy (Rating Downgrade)
text: We recommend holding off on investing in Mid-America Apartment Communities due to potential challenges in the rental market and a recent run-up in the REIT's value. While rising home prices and rents have benefited MAA, as more people are forced into renting, this trend may not last as the housing market starts to cool and supply increases. Rents may start to decrease along with home prices, as seen in previous economic cycles, which could pose a challenge for MAA. We advise patience and waiting for a better entry point for investment.

title: 2 Solid Buys In Apartment REITs
text: Apartment REITs have been the fourth-best performing REIT sector this year, outperforming the S&P 400 and 600. Despite outstanding operating performance, apartment REITs have taken a beating on share prices over the past 12 months, creating an abundance of bargains. Although multifamily housing starts and permits have increased sharply, the supply-demand picture remains favorable for apartment REITs.
